falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,200 on any single day within the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break below the August 2024 low would invalidate the 79% bottom pattern match, proving this is not a repeat of that structure and the macro floor thesis is wrong

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for two consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Blowoff score of 38 suggests controlled fear; sustained VIX above 35 indicates panic escalation inconsistent with a bottoming process, invalidating the HOLD signal

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury yield curve uninverts (10Y yield exceeds 2Y yield by more than 10 basis points)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A steepening uninversion during this pattern would signal recession confirmation rather than soft landing, breaking the macro conditions that produced the August 2024 bottom

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
